name: boards
description: Kanban-plugin task board with Templater date-routed card notes under spice/boards/. v0.2.0 MINOR (v0.58.0 FA-6): canonical-vocab adoption per Frontmatter Alignment. Template, Board Card.md emits canonical created_at: (ISO+TZ; replaces legacy created:) + type: board-card; discriminator tag board stripped; temporal YYYY/MM/DD tag stripped; preserve kanban-card functional marker (per _canonical-vocab.preserve_tags). To-Do-Board.md hub kanban-plugin block gains static created_at: (rule_fragment scope only covers cards path; hub kanban frontmatter is plugin-managed and outside the canonical-vocab contract). NEW canonical-vocab rule_fragment scoping spice/boards/cards/**/*.md (where Templater-routed card notes land).

external_plugins.reason: Renders {{module_directory}}/To-Do-Board.md as an interactive kanban; without the plugin the board renders as plain markdown.

pre_install.reason: v0.1.1-era top-level Dataview-kanban file (project blueprint Board contribution); superseded by spice/boards/To-Do-Board.md (Kanban-plugin format) at this blueprint's install.

post_install.message: Boards blueprint installed at spice/boards/. REQUIRED: enable the Kanban community plugin (Settings → Community plugins → Browse → Kanban) AND the Templater 'Trigger Templater on new file creation' setting. Then click the Board nav-button from any note. Cards added in the kanban auto-route to spice/boards/cards/YYYY/MM-MMMM/<title>.md via Templater. Note: any v0.1.1-era top-level boards/To-Do-Board.md was deleted by pre_install (backup at boards/To-Do-Board.md.pre_install_bak).
